subject: New Request: Microservices Engineer
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Payloop
ROLE: Mid Microservices Engineer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 6 months
LOCATION: Göteborg / on-site
RATE: 825 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, AWS, PostgreSQL and RabbitMQ.

Key requirements:

  • Java
  • AWS
  • PostgreSQL
  • RabbitMQ

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Niklas Persson
Country Manager
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 70 012 34 56
